title: Portfolio Snapshots Contract v1
description: Canonical portfolio snapshot payloads produced by PortfolioSnapshots for PnL tracking and dashboard time-series display.

portfolio_snapshot_result.description: A single portfolio value snapshot at a point in time.

date_str.description: ISO-8601 date or datetime string for the snapshot

total_value.description: Total portfolio value (cash + positions) in dollars

positions_value.description: Current market value of all open positions in dollars

unrealized_pnl.description: Unrealized profit/loss in dollars (can be negative)

realized_pnl.description: Realized profit/loss in dollars (can be negative)

position_count.description: Number of open positions at snapshot time

snapshot_summary.description: Summary statistics over a range of snapshots.

start_date.description: ISO-8601 date for the earliest snapshot in the range

end_date.description: ISO-8601 date for the latest snapshot in the range

snapshot_count.description: Total number of snapshots in the range

total_return.description: Total return over the range in dollars (can be negative)

avg_daily_return.description: Average daily return in dollars (can be negative)
